verses.text: Efraim mi Zuf' tapa Tohu, a tapa Elihu, a tapa Jehoram, a tapa Elkanah a kici min nei mi khat Efraim mualtung gam Ramathaimzofim-ah om hi
Amah in zi nih nei hi. Khat' min Hannah hi a, a khat' min Peninnah ahi hi. Peninnah in ta nei a, ahih hangin Hannah in neilo hi
Elkanah a kumkumin a khuapi panin, Eli' tapa nihte Hofni leh Finehas in Topa' siampi a sepna mun Shiloh-ah Vanglian Topa a bia ding leh ama tungah biakna a pia dingin a pai zel hi
Elkanah in biakna a piak ciangin a zi Peninnah leh a tanu leh a tapate khempeuh tungah tanh pia hi
Amah in Hannah a it hangin Topa in amah ta neisaklo ahih manin Hannah tungah tanh khat bek a pia hi
Topa in amah ta neisaklo ahih manin amah a el a zipih in amah nakpi takin phin zel, hehsak zel hi
Tua ahih ciangin a kumkumin tua bangin hi den uh hi. Topa' inn-ah a paitoh simin Peninnah in Hannah phin zel hi. Tua ahih ciangin Hannah kapin an nelo hi

Tua ciangin ama pasal Elkanah in, “Hannah aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Bang hangin an nelo na hi hiam? Bang hangin na lungsim dah ahi hiam? Kei pen tapa sawm sangin nang-a' dingin hoihzaw hilo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Amaute in Shiloh-ah an a nek khit uh ciangin khatvei Hannah ding khia-in biakinn-ah thungen dingin a pai hi. Tua hun laitakin Topa' biakinn kongkhak khuam pangah siampi Eli na tu hi
Tuanu nakpi takin lungkhamin Topa' tungah thu ngenin nakpi takin a kap hi

Amah in thuciamna khat bawlin, “Vanglian Topa aw, nangmah in na nasemnu' gimna nong et takpi a, keimah hong phawkin na nasemnu hong mangngilh loin na nasemnu tungah tapa khat nong piak leh, Topa' tungah a khan' tawntungin amah kong pia ding a, ama lu-ah mulkiatna kitahlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa' mai-ah thungenin a om laitakin Eli in tuanu' kam na en hi
Hannah a lungsimah pau hi. A mukte bek lingin a awging kizalo ahih ciangin Eli in tua numei zukhamin ngaihsun hi
Tua ahih ciangin Eli in ama kiangah, “Bang tanvei zu kham ding na hi hiam? Na leenggahzu nek khawl in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Hannah in dawngin, “Hilo hi, ka topa aw; kei pen nakpi takin a lungkham numei ka hi hi. Leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu ahi zongin ka ne kei a, Topa' mai-ah ka lungsim a sungkhia ka hi hi
Lungkhamna leh gimna tawh a pau ka hih manin numei ginalo bangin na nasemnu hong ngaihsun kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Eli in dawngin, “Nuam takin pai in. Israel-te' Pasian in ama tungah na ngetsa thu hong pia hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin numei in, “Nangma mitah na nasemnu maipha hong musak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei pai-in an ne a, dahmai pua nawnlo hi
Amaute zingsangin tho baihin biakinn-ah Topa a biak khit uh ciangin amaute' khua Ramah-a a inn uhah a ciahkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Elkanah in a zi Hannah luppih a, Topa in tuanu' thungetna a pia hi
A hun ciangin Hannah gai-in tapa khat nei a, a min Samuel a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “ Topa' tung panin amah ka nget ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Elkanah leh a innkuante khempeuh Topa' tungah kumsim biakna leh a thuciamna a pia dingin paito kik uh hi

Ahih hangin Hannah paito lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pasal kiangah, “Naungek nawi tawh a kikhen phetin Topa' omna mai-ah kilakin tua lai-ah a om tawntung dingin ka paipih ding hi,” a ci hi

A pasal Elkanah in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in hoih na sak pen bangin gamta in la, amah nawi tawh a kikhen dong ngak in. Topa in a kammal hong kipsak ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupi omin nawi tawh a kikhen mateng a ta a khoi hi
Numei in amah nawi tawh a kikhensak khit ciangin kum thum a pha bawngtal khat, annel seu khat, leh leenggahzu savun thawl khat tawh amah la-in, Shiloh-a Topa' inn-ah amah a paipih hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a bawngtal go-in Eli kiangah a naupang a paipih uh hi
Tuanu in, “Aw ka topa! Nangmah, a nungta na hih mah bangin ka topa aw, keimah in Topa' tungah thu ngenin nangma omna hih lai munah a dingnu ka hi hi
Hih naupang ka ngen hi. Topa in ama tungah keima ngetna hong pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' tungah amah ka kawm hi. A nuntak laiteng Topa' tungah amah a kikawm ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua lai-ah Topa a bia uh hi.
